# FairShare Lite - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
A simplified expense-sharing web application built with TypeScript, Express, React, Tailwind CSS, and PostgreSQL.

**Stack:**
- Backend: Node.js + Express + TypeScript
- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Deployment: Render

## Architecture
- Monorepo structure with `/backend` and `/frontend` folders
- One-level groups (no nesting)
- Three main screens: Login/Register, Group list/detail, Add expense/Settle up
- No real-time features, no charts, desktop-only

- [x] Backend scaffold (Express, TypeScript, database models)
- [x] Frontend scaffold (React, Tailwind, pages)
- [x] PostgreSQL setup with Docker (docker-compose.yml)
- [x] Dependencies configured and installed
- [x] Initial components created
- [x] README updated
